today.title: Today
today.greeting: Hi 👋 Your day will show up here soon.

summary.tip: Study-load counts · GET /api/v1/schedule/summary — reads conspectus_schedules for the current owner. Now = next_review_at ≤ now(); Next 24 h = ≤ now()+24h; Total = every active (is_row_invalid=0) row.

streak.tip: Consecutive review days · GET /api/v1/me/stats — walks conspectus_review_logs grouped by DATE(reviewed_at). Streak is alive today (or yesterday, 24-h grace) and counts back while every prior day has ≥1 review.

yesterday.title: Yesterday
yesterday.tip: Previous UTC day recap · GET /api/v1/me/yesterday — reviewed = COUNT(*) on that day; target = reviewed + still-due-from-yesterday; accuracy = COUNT(tag='easy') × 100 / reviewed.

heatmap.title: Last 90 days
heatmap.tip: 90-day review activity · GET /api/v1/schedule/history — per-day COUNT(*) from conspectus_review_logs, bucketed 0..4 (0=none · 1<3 · 2<7 · 3<12 · 4≥12). Hover any cell to see the exact count.

recent.title: Recently reviewed
recent.tip: Recently reviewed notes (currently a slice of the due list) · derived from GET /api/v1/conspectuses/due. Tap any row to open its detail.

dueList.tip: Due list · GET /api/v1/conspectuses/due — conspectus_schedules with next_review_at ≤ now(), sorted asc. Tap any row to open its detail.

empty.title: All caught up for today
empty.hint: Come back later — the next wave of cards is on schedule.
